treatment_information.dosage_or_details: regular protocol for hypergonadotropic hypogonadism in males
treatment_information.treatment_response: gynecomastia and elevated gonadotropic hormone and estradiol levels regressed owing to the negative feedback regulation

treatment_timeline.event: surgical correction of hypospadias for both patients

patient_outcome.final_status: patient 1 responded well to testosterone supplementation; patient 2 is still in prepubertal age and does not yet receive hormone therapy
patient_outcome.follow_up_details: both children undergo regular endocrinological control
